reason: Authoritative checklist for adding new platforms (10-step guide)
Central registry - must add AITool, TemplateDir, CliFlag union members and AI_TOOLS entries
PLATFORM_FUNCTIONS registry - must add configure/collectTemplates entries
Reference pattern for Trae configurator (skills-based platform)
Reference pattern for Qoder configurator (commands-only platform)
Reference template index for Trae (skills listing pattern)
Reference template index for Qoder (commands listing pattern)
Must add trae/qoder to InitOptions interface
Must add trae/qoder to Platform literal and all method branches
Must add Trae and Qoder to supported tools list
Must add Trae and Qoder to supported tools list (Chinese)
